title: Hiring Category Manager at Amazon India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Amazon India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
